abstract: Pass/fail review gate for domain-driven design quality in any codebase: a single blind reviewer judges a diff, module/bounded context, or DSL surface against 20 decidable rules across glossary lifecycle, language consistency, domain model integrity, context boundaries, and semantic-model/DSL craft. The glossary lifecycle fails closed — domain concepts with no recorded ubiquitous language is a FAIL whose fix list names the entries to create — so repeated runs converge any project's code, team, and stakeholders on one recorded, well-sized vocabulary.
